props.name: description
props.description: Body text; override with the default slot for rich content.

props.name: href
props.description: Link href; when set (and no `link` slot) a link is rendered.

props.name: actions
props.description: Data-driven action buttons (alternative to the `actions` slot).

props.name: closeLabel
props.description: Accessible name for the close button.

props.name: open
props.description: Controls visibility (bindable). Dismissing sets it to `false`; set it back to `true` to show the alert again.

props.name: plain
props.description: No-surface variant: drop the tinted background and border (the message sits on the page). The status stays visible via the colored FeedbackIcon chip.

props.name: iconShape
props.description: Shape of the FeedbackIcon box — `"rounded"` (default) or a full `"round"` circle.

props.name: iconBox
props.description: FeedbackIcon box override. By default the box is tinted on plain/inverted alerts and transparent on tinted surfaces (so it doesn't clash); set `"tint"` or `"solid"` to force a visible chip on a tinted surface too.
